items.title: Three women interviewed on suspicion of sex trafficking in Al Fayed investigation
items.description: The women have been interviewed under suspicion of aiding and abetting rape and human trafficking, the Met Police says.

items.title: Meghan's lifestyle brand and Netflix end partnership
items.description: The Duchess of Sussex will run As ever independently, after a partnership with Netflix helped to launch the brand last year.

items.title: Tory peer quits after Lords investigation into PPE deals
items.description: It comes after a Lords standards probe into his contacts with ministers and advisers during the pandemic.

items.title: Mexico to deploy 100,000 security personnel for World Cup
items.description: World Cup co-hosts Mexico plan to deploy nearly 100,000 security personnel to protect fans at this summer's tournament, amid ongoing cartel violence i...

items.title: Fatbikes are wreaking havoc in Sydney's wealthy beach suburbs
items.description: Teens are infuriating locals by riding over golf courses and doing wheelies on the Harbour Bridge.
